nodes.name: tidrangescan.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for TID range scans, verifying efficient ctid-range based heap scans introduced as an optimization.

nodes.name: tidscan.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for TID scans (direct tuple-pointer lookups), verifying ctid-based access path selection and execution.

nodes.name: time.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the time data type, covering parsing, arithmetic, timezone conversions, and time-specific functions.

nodes.name: timestamp.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the timestamp data type, covering precision, arithmetic, formatting, and comparison operations.

nodes.name: timestamptz.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for timestamp with time zone, covering DST transitions, timezone conversions, and interval arithmetic.

nodes.name: timetz.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the timetz (time with time zone) data type, verifying timezone-aware time operations and comparisons.

nodes.name: transactions.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for transaction semantics, covering BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK, savepoints, error recovery, and DDL in transactions.

nodes.name: triggers.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for triggers, covering row-level and statement-level triggers, BEFORE/AFTER/INSTEAD OF, and trigger firing order.

nodes.name: truncate.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for TRUNCATE TABLE, covering cascade behavior, foreign key checks, trigger interactions, and transaction rollback.

nodes.name: tsdicts.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for text search dictionaries, covering simple, snowball, synonym, and thesaurus dictionary configurations.

nodes.name: tsearch.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for full-text search, covering tsvector/tsquery, to_tsvector, to_tsquery, ranking, and GIN/GiST indexes.

nodes.name: tsrf.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for table-valued functions in FROM clause (SRF in FROM), verifying set-returning function expansion and lateral usage.

nodes.name: tstypes.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for text search types (tsvector and tsquery), covering construction, operators, normalization, and query matching.

nodes.name: tuplesort.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for tuple sorting behavior, verifying correct ORDER BY semantics with various data types and null ordering.

nodes.name: txid.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for transaction ID (txid) functions, covering txid_current, txid_snapshot, and transaction visibility checks.

nodes.name: type_sanity.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL catalog sanity checks for type definitions, verifying that all types have valid input/output functions and consistent properties.

nodes.name: typed_table.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for typed tables (OF type_name), verifying typed table creation, constraints, and interaction with composite types.

nodes.name: unicode.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for Unicode handling, covering Unicode escape sequences, normalization, and multi-byte character operations.

nodes.name: union.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for UNION, INTERSECT, and EXCEPT set operations, covering ALL variants and type coercion.

nodes.name: updatable_views.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for updatable views, covering auto-updatable simple views, WITH CHECK OPTION, and INSTEAD OF triggers.
